creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Gerald, any clue if this is not a libstdc++ bug or not? It affects -std=c++11 or later but clang/libc++ 5.0 seem to be fine. I've tracked down the regression to r243036.

https://gcc.gnu.org/viewcvs/gcc?view=revision&revision=243006
https://gcc.gnu.org/viewcvs/gcc?view=revision&revision=243036
